states.name: Cera
states.title: Red Dragon Knight of Virtue
states.description: Cera was raised in an orphanage within a kingdom steeped in corruption and decay. By nature, she was a shy and tidy girl, but her environment was abysmal. Funds were used to line the pockets of the orphanage's administrators while the children endured meager meals and the constant threat of violence from the caretakers.

states.name: Cera
states.title: Red Dragon Knight of Virtue
states.description: Amid those dark days, the Gru Grim suddenly attacked the orphanage. Cera was nearly abducted and had resigned herself to death—but she was saved by a certain woman, who also freed her from the orphanage's grasp. That woman was none other than Elmina, who had broken free from her brainwashing.

states.name: Cera
states.title: Red Dragon Knight of Virtue
states.description: In admiration of Elmina's strength, Cera traveled from town to town, honing her skills through relentless training. In time, she entered the Red Dragon Academy and graduated at the top of her class. Though she faced much opposition, she chose to turn away from the path of the elite and serve under her benefactor, Elmina—to repay the favor from years past.
